title: README slim-down: graph sections
goal: Condense the three graph sections (## Machine-readable project map, ### Incremental update, ### Auto-update hook) into one short paragraph plus a link to docs/non-interactive/map.md, moving the --file incremental mechanics and the PostToolUse hook snippet into docs so the README stops duplicating them.

steps.title: Audit map.md coverage gaps
steps.detail: List README graph facts absent from docs/non-interactive/map.md — the full PostToolUse hook block + rationale (no-jq, quiet/non-blocking, deletion/rename reconciliation) and the --file nuances (per-file = identical to full rebuild, graph.json fallback, no-op for ignored/non-mappable, node removal on delete). Decide kept-in-README vs. moved-to-docs.

steps.title: Enrich map.md docs
steps.detail: Add the full PostToolUse settings.json hook snippet with its rationale and the --file incremental nuances to docs/non-interactive/map.md so nothing is lost.

steps.title: Slim graph sections to a blurb
steps.detail: Replace the three README sections (## Machine-readable project map + ### Incremental update + ### Auto-update hook) with one short paragraph (what the graph is, gitignored, regenerate anytime) plus a link to docs/non-interactive/map.md.

steps.title: Fix cross-refs and verify
steps.detail: Re-home the (see below) reference in the ## Files tree, confirm all docs links resolve, README is meaningfully shorter, and no dangling references remain.
